query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN hasNumber = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_number_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN questionMark = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as question_mark_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN exclaimMark = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as exclaim_mark_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN youFlag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as you_flag_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN iFlag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as i_flag_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ctaFlag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cta_flag_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN timePressureFlag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as time_pressure_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN resultFlag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as result_flag_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN turnFlag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as turn_flag_count,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM viral_examples;

  SUM(CASE WHEN questionMark = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as question_mark_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN exclaimMark = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as exclaim_mark_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN youFlag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as you_flag_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN iFlag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as i_flag_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ctaFlag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cta_flag_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN timePressureFlag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as time_pressure_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN resultFlag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as result_flag_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN turnFlag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as turn_flag_count,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM viral_examples;
